Waynesville, Ohio

Art Expressions & Infinite Tea

Loose leaf tea, a beautiful and comfortable tea room, and all the trinkets your heart could desire

Explore Our Teas Book a Tea Party

✽

A Tea House & Art Shop

A tea house & art shop in the heart of Waynesville, Ohio — the Antiques Capital of the Midwest. Step inside to discover hundreds of loose-leaf teas, a cozy tea room, and a curated collection of art, gifts, and handmade treasures.

Learn our story →
From our collection

Featured Teas

Green Tea

Sencha Supreme

Smooth, grassy Japanese green tea with a clean, sweet finish.

grassysmoothclassic
Green Tea

Jasmine Pearl

Hand-rolled green tea leaves scented with fresh jasmine blossoms.

floralaromatichand-rolled
Green Tea

Matcha Ceremonial Grade

Stone-ground Japanese green tea powder. Vibrant, creamy, and rich in umami.

umamivibrantceremonial
Black Tea

Darjeeling First Flush

Light-bodied with muscatel character and floral notes. The Champagne of teas.

floralmuscatelelegant
Browse All 225+ Teas
01

225+ Loose Leaf Teas

From classic greens and bold blacks to herbal tisanes and house blends — there's a cup here for everyone.

02

Art & Unique Gifts

Browse local art, handmade goods, books, and treasures you won't find anywhere else.

03

Cozy Tea Room

Settle into our comfortable tea room in the heart of historic Waynesville and let us brew something wonderful.

Gatherings

Host a Tea Party

Gather your favourite people for an unforgettable afternoon. Scones, sandwiches, and the perfect cup — we handle everything.

Available Wednesday – Sunday, 11 AM – 1 PM

View Packages & Events
Starting from $35 per person
  • Choice of tea from our full menu
  • Freshly baked scones & sandwiches
  • Petit fours & seasonal sweets
Take something home

Browse Our Shop

01

Loose Leaf Tea

Take your favourites home. Pouches, tins, and gift boxes.

Art & Pottery

Local handmade ceramics, prints, and one-of-a-kind pieces.

Gifts & More

Books, soaps, teaware, and curated gift sets.
